# launchdarkly_announcement (Resource)

Provides a LaunchDarkly announcement resource.

This resource allows you to create and manage an in-app announcement banner that appears in the LaunchDarkly user interface for everyone in your organization.

-> **Note:** LaunchDarkly supports only one announcement per account. Attempting to create a second `launchdarkly_announcement` while one already exists returns a `409` conflict. Update the existing announcement instead.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "launchdarkly_announcement" "scheduled_maintenance" {
  title          = "Scheduled maintenance"
  message        = "LaunchDarkly will be undergoing **scheduled maintenance** on January 1st. The app may be briefly unavailable."
  severity       = "warning"
  is_dismissible = true
  start_time     = 1893456000000 # Unix timestamp in milliseconds (2030-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  end_time       = 1924992000000 # Unix timestamp in milliseconds (2031-01-01T00:00:00Z)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `is_dismissible` (Boolean) Whether viewers can dismiss the announcement banner.
- `message` (String) The body of the announcement. Supports Markdown.
- `severity` (String) The severity of the announcement. Must be one of `info`, `warning`, and `critical`.
- `start_time` (Number) The time the announcement becomes active, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
- `title` (String) The title of the announcement.

### Optional

- `end_time` (Number) The time the announcement is no longer active, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds. If omitted, the announcement does not automatically expire.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique announcement ID.
- `status` (String) The computed status of the announcement, such as `active`, `scheduled`, or `inactive`. LaunchDarkly derives it from the current time and the announcement's start and end times.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# LaunchDarkly announcements can be imported using the announcement's ID
terraform import launchdarkly_announcement.scheduled_maintenance 1234567890
```
